purpose_context.objective: Bridge selected-collection promise to explicit scanable slices before worker traversal.

protected_state: Selected collection identity and queued track count stay aligned across screen, runtime lookup, and preview render.

mutable_surfaces.notes: Entry point where selected collection changes before queue setup.

mutable_surfaces.ref: queue rule table key normalization and lookup
mutable_surfaces.notes: Lookup miss or nil rule collection causes downstream preview drift.
Final user-visible projection of rule/selection consistency.

interaction_families.statement: Queue lookup resolves a selected collection key into rule collection and expected count inputs.
interaction_families.actor_scope: collection picker UI + queue rule lookup

interaction_families.statement: Preview render projects resolved queue values back into visible queued track count.

consistency_boundaries.statement: screenCollection/runtimeCollection/ruleCollection remain equivalent for the selected collection.
consistency_boundaries.settlement_horizon: selection change to first rule lookup completion
consistency_boundaries.notes: Primary boundary behind lookup_miss_under_aligned_selection anomaly shape.

consistency_boundaries.statement: Preview queued track count equals rule-derived count for the selected collection.
consistency_boundaries.settlement_horizon: lookup completion to first preview render
consistency_boundaries.notes: Secondary boundary used after key agreement is confirmed.

pressure_axes: lookup miss with non-empty runtime key
nil collection code in rule layer
partial state agreement (ui/runtime aligned, rule divergent)

slice_candidates.rationale: Current frame/task evidence already centers on lookup-key drift under aligned UI selection.
Useful follow-up once lookup consistency is re-established.
